name: Baa Baa Black Sheep
source: Based on traditional nursery rhyme melody, same as 'Twinkle Twinkle Little Star' and 'Alphabet Song' (French melody 'Ah! vous dirai-je, maman'). Piano notes confirmed via multiple sources including KidsPlayMusic.com and Beth's Notes Plus.
notes: Traditional English nursery rhyme dating back to 1744. Uses the same melody as 'Twinkle Twinkle Little Star'. Set in C major with simple quarter and half note rhythm pattern. Standard nursery rhyme version with all verses following the same melodic structure.
